content: give me an HTML about how great cats are !
I'll have the team build a fun, self-contained HTML page about cats!

Restated request: Create a single static HTML page that celebrates cats. The page should have a catchy title, several sections explaining why cats are great (personality, independence, purring, etc.), cute styling, and an interactive element such as a fun fact generator or a toggle.

Type: static

Files to create:
- index.html - Main page with inline CSS and JavaScript, containing the title, sections, styling, and interactive fun fact generator.

@Coder the plan is ready.
